tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"which chattr || echo NO_CHATTR; chattr +i /usr/sbin/hping3 || echo CHATTR_FAILED; lsattr /usr/sbin/hping3 || echo LSATTR_FAILED; ping -c 3 -W 2 192.168.1.2 || echo PING_FAILED; curl -ksS -o /dev/null -w \"HTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}\\nREMOTE_IP:%{remote_ip}\\nTIME_TOTAL:%{time_total}s\\n\" --max-time 10 https://1.1.1.1 || echo CURL_FAILED; iptables -L OUTPUT -n --line-numbers"}
